title: Battery-Emulator DTC description file
description: Array of DTC (Diagnostic Trouble Code) description entries consumed by the web UI's DTC loader (get_dtc_json_loader_html). See README.md in this folder.

items.description: One DTC. Must have a non-empty 'l_dsc' and at least one usable identifier ('code' or a non-empty 'dtc').

code.description: Decimal DTC code. Matches table cells whose data-dtc-code holds the decimal value. To mean 'no code', omit this key (do NOT use an empty string).

dtc.description: DTC string, e.g. 'P0C9500'. Matches cells whose data-dtc-code holds the string. May be empty only when 'code' is present.

s_dsc.description: Short/internal description, shown in grey italics under the long one. Optional; an empty value is simply omitted from the output.

l_dsc.description: Long human-readable description. This is the displayed text. Required and non-empty.

examples.l_dsc: Hybrid/EV Battery Temperature Sensor "K" Circuit High
